context_for_next_testing_agent: Run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_chinguspeak_api.py to verify backend routes. Camera route is now working. Learn page is broken. All 7 new Premium routes (transcribe, tts, credits/*, subscriptions/verify, modules/content) return 404 on Hostinger - PHP deployment needs update. Icon fonts broken across all mobile pages.
rca_of_the_issue: PRIMARY RCA: Hostinger PHP backend deployment is STALE - the index.php and mobile.php files in the repository contain all required routes, but the deployed version on Hostinger does not have these routes active (all return 404). This is a deployment synchronization issue. SECONDARY RCA: Icon font files are either corrupted during build/deploy or served with incorrect MIME type, causing OTS parsing errors. TERTIARY RCA: Learn route exists in source but deployed Expo web build shows 'Page not found' - likely build/export configuration issue.

mocked_apis_list: AdMob rewarded completion trigger is app-side/manual hook (as documented)
Google Play verification endpoint stores/activates and returns pending-server-verification (as documented)
